C

calcTowrite(ArrayList<String>, double, int, int) - Method in class ms_newcharts.Ms2chart
Calculates the first character for every line in .xyz file from the strings of predefined characters.
calcTypes(StringBuffer, int) - Method in class ms_newcharts.Ms2chart
Prepare arrays of Type, X , Y, Z, Sigma and Columns from the data in the start of the .vim file

Some calculations for the norm.
